concerns.text: T015 (Generate dataset size report) is scheduled BEFORE T016 (Save raw/cleaned data). The report consumes data that doesn't exist until T016 completes. This is a consumer-before-producer ordering violation. T015 must follow T016.

T032/T033 reference 'combined complexity metric visualization' and 'interpretation' per Dan Rockmore review, but no combined metric artifact is produced anywhere in the task list. The spec explicitly focuses on crossing number and braid index separately (FR-005: 'not composite measures'). These tasks have no producer—either add a metric-computation task or remove the references.

T040 records checksums in docs/reproducibility/checksums.md, but FR-007 and Constitution Principle III require checksums recorded under data/ directory with documentation in docs/reproducibility. T039 generates checksums but doesn't specify writing to data/. Split into two tasks: (1) write checksums to data/, (2) document in docs/reproducibility.

T007 implements random seed pinning in code/__init__.py but doesn't reference the documentation requirement. T050 addresses documentation in docs/reproducibility/random_seeds.md separately. Add a note in T007 that seeds must be documented per Constitution Principle I to improve traceability.
